APPEND.summary: Append a record to the end of the log

GET_ALL.summary: Retrieve all records from the log

EXECUTE_CONCURRENT.summary: Invoke all declared workflows concurrently; collect results correlated by code

DELETE.summary: Remove the given key and its value

DELETE_MANY.summary: Delete a list of keys; idempotent per key (NOT_FOUND treated as already deleted)

EXISTS.summary: Check if a key exists in storage

READ.summary: Retrieve value for a given key

UPDATE_WHERE.notes: filter={field:value,...} AND semantics; updates={field:value,...} applied to all matched records; null value removes field; VIOLATION when no records match; load+filter+update+save serialized under per-file threading lock
UPDATE_WHERE.summary: Atomically update all records matching ALL filter conditions; serialized per file

WRITE.summary: Store or update a value at the given key

DEREGISTER.summary: Mark a key or address as deregistered via tombstone

EXISTS.summary: Check if a key or address is registered

REGISTER.summary: Register a new key to address binding

RESOLVE.summary: Resolve a key or address to its storage target

EXECUTE_SEQUENCE.summary: Iterate sequence; invoke item_wf per item and dispatch sub-items by key-field mapping

READ.summary: Look up resource addresses for a given name

WRITE.summary: Register or update name to resource addresses mapping

value.description: The value to emit as the result

fields.description: Key-value map of fields to include in the record

parent_chain_code_bytes.description: 32-byte parent chain code as hex string with '0x' prefix

parent_private_key_bytes.description: 32-byte parent private key as hex string with '0x' prefix

seed_bytes.description: Seed bytes as hex string with '0x' prefix (e.g., from mnemonic) at least 128 bits long

curve.description: Elliptic curve to use for signing

message_hash.description: 32-byte message hash to sign as hex string with '0x' prefix

private_key_bytes.description: 32-byte ECDSA private key as hex string with '0x' prefix

entropy_bytes.description: Cryptographically secure entropy as hex string with '0x' prefix

current_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of current evaluation time

threshold_days.description: Number of days before considering a holder inactive

from.description: Context symbol or object to extract from

filter.description: Field criteria dict. Values are exact match or "present" for existence check.

source.description: Array of record objects to filter

data.description: Input data to hash for ID generation

input_bytes.description: Hex-encoded byte string (with or without 0x prefix)

map.description: The mapping object to search in

curve.description: The elliptic curve to use for derivation.

private_key_bytes.description: Private key scalar as hex string with '0x' prefix

public_key_uncompressed_bytes.description: Uncompressed public key (65 bytes, starting with 0x04) as hex string with '0x' prefix

schema.description: Validation rules keyed by field name

slot_start_ts.description: Slot start timestamp; when omitted, a deterministic ISO timestamp is derived from slot_number (base 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z + slot × 30 s)

entropy_bytes.description: Optional injected entropy for deterministic testing; overrides OS-generated entropy

eligible_validators.description: Array of active validator records; each must have actor_id field

core.description: Maps entity types to storage implementations and paths

BLOCKS.description: Block state storage (block_id → block record; CS_MUTABLE_JSON_V0)

MEMPOOL.description: Ephemeral staging buffer for pending transactions (CS_MUTABLE_JSON_V0); keyed by tx_id; deleted on drain

MEMPOOL_INDEX.description: Deduplication registry for tx_id and tx_hash uniqueness (CS_REGISTRY_V0)

rules: Each entity type has dedicated storage
Cross-entity queries forbidden (no joins)
Entity reads must specify entity type explicitly
Storage paths resolved via STRUCTURE only
Path changes are STRUCTURE updates (versioned)
CC artifacts remain unchanged during migration
Runtime resolves paths from active STRUCTURE version

storage_roots.description: Root path for all blockchain domain storage (resolved at runtime)

core.description: Maps slot clock and simulation summary entities to storage implementations and paths

SIMULATION_SUMMARY.description: Append-only simulation outcome journal (CS_APPENDONLY_JSONL_V0); one record per completed simulation run; immutable after write

SLOT_CLOCK.description: Keyed mutable slot clock record (CS_MUTABLE_JSON_V0); one active record per simulation_id; initialized at launch; advanced per slot

rules: simulation_id is the primary isolation boundary — each simulation run owns exactly one SLOT_CLOCK record
Concurrent simulation runs identified by distinct simulation_id values do not collide
No non-orchestration artifact may directly mutate SLOT_CLOCK or SIMULATION_SUMMARY stores
blockchain::orchestration CCs write only to orchestration stores; cross-subdomain writes are forbidden
Storage paths resolved via STRUCTURE only — no hardcoded paths in CC or RB artifacts
Path changes are STRUCTURE updates (versioned)
CC artifacts remain unchanged during migration
Runtime resolves paths from active STRUCTURE version

storage_roots.description: Root path for all orchestration subdomain storage (resolved at runtime)
